channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Simone Biles risks Bears fans' backlash again after saying Packers star among most impressive NFL players
item.description: Simone Biles may have irked Chicago Bears fans again after shouting out Green Bay Packers quarterback Jordan Love during a podcast appearance.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chaos hits AP Top 25 with 4 teams ranked in the top 11 losing to unranked opponents
item.description: Vanderbilt's stunning upset of No. 1 Alabama that led to crazed fans marching the goal posts through the streets of Nashville was just the appetizer. Saturday proved to be one of the wildest days in The Associated Press college football poll in years.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How San Jose State volleyball players and parents are grappling with transgender player controversy
item.description: The controversy has hurled the 19 San Jose State volleyball players into the maelstrom, tearing them between friendship and their own senses of fairness as drama swirls around them, armed guards protect them, their winning record is questioned and their season ahead evaporates one game after another
item.dc:creator: Julia Prodis Sulek, The Mercury News

item.title: Coco Gauff wins China Open final in straight sets, Sinner rallies to advance in Shanghai
item.description: BEIJING (AP) — Coco Gauff won her second title this season with a lopsided 6-1, 6-3 victory over Karolina Muchova in the final of the China Open on Sunday. Aged 20, the sixth-ranked U.S. player became the youngest China Open champion in 14 years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets add QB Adrian Martinez to roster for game against Vikings
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The New York Jets have activated third-string quarterback Adrian Martinez for Sunday’s game against the Minnesota Vikings at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. Martinez would serve as an emergency quarterback behind starter Aaron Rodgers and backup Tyrod Taylor.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bears vs. Panthers: What to know for Sunday's Week 5 matchup at Soldier Field
item.description: Carolina (1-3) at Chicago (2-2) Sunday, Noon, Fox BetMGM NFL Odds: Bears by 3 1/2 Series record: Bears lead 8-4. Against the spread: Panthers 1-3, Bears 2-1-1. Last meeting: Bears beat Panthers 16-13 on Nov. 9, 2023. Last week: Panthers lost 34-24 to Cincinnati; Bears beat Los Angeles Rams 24-18.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: No. 8 Miami rallies from 25 points down to beat California 39-38
item.description: BERKELEY, Calif. (AP) — Halfway through his first season at Miami, Cam Ward has already shown a knack for the dramatic. Ward threw a 5-yard touchdown pass to Elijah Arroyo with 26 seconds left and No.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Singleton scores late TD as Arkansas beats No. 4 Tennessee 19-14
item.description: FAYETTEVILLE, Ark. (AP) — Malachi Singleton scored on an 11-yard run with 1:17 remaining to lift Arkansas to a 19-14 win over No. 4 Tennessee on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees, Royals make MLB history in wild first game of ALDS
item.description: The New York Yankees survived a wild game against the Kansas City Royals on Saturday to take Game 1 of the American League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bay FC’s big, late collapse leads to 5-1 loss to NJ/NY Gotham FC
item.description: Gotham FC turns a late 1-1 tie into a rout, scoring three goals in a rough four-minute stretch for Bay FC.
item.dc:creator: Jon Becker, The Mercury News

item.title: Verdugo's go-ahead single and acrobatic catch lift Yankees over Royals 6-5 in ALDS opener
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Verdugo hit a tiebreaking single in the seventh inning and saved at least one run with a sliding catch along the left-field line, boosting the New York Yankees over the Kansas City Royals 6-5 on Saturday night in their AL Division Series opener.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: PHOTOS: Padres and Dodgers face off in game 1 of the NLDS
item.description: The San Diego Padres are continuing their postseason journey in game one of the NLDS against the Dodgers after defeating the Braves earlier this week in the NL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Vanderbilt stuns top-ranked Alabama, securing Commodores' first-ever win over No. 1 team
item.description: Alabama knocked off Georgia last week in what was arguably the college football game of the year. But the Crimson Tide appeared to have an emotional letdown seven days later.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees playoff tickets cost more in Kansas City than the Bronx
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) --- So, not everything is more expensive in New York City. Yankees fans will shell out less cash for a seat at Yankees Stadium than Kauffman Stadium in Kansas City when the American League Division Series kicks off Saturday at Yankee Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Mira Wassef, PIX 11

item.title: Team president Jed Hoyer disappointed about 2024, but optimistic about Cubs' direction
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The 2024 MLB playoffs began Tuesday, and the Cubs were once again not among the six teams in the National League playoff field.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tom Brady to announce 49ers-Cardinals game Sunday
item.description: (KRON) -- Tom Brady will announce his first San Francisco 49ers game on Sunday, according to his page on Fox's website. The ex-player considered the Greatest Of All Time by many made the switch to the announcing booth this season.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Jazz new additions bring experience and leadership
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz did not land the "big game" Danny Ainge talked about in April, but they did sign a few key veteran role players this summer. Patty Mills is about to begin his 16th NBA season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: From food to murder, Aaron Rodgers talks all things Berkeley ahead of College GameDay appearance
item.description: (KRON) -- The college football world will have its eyes on Berkeley this weekend as Cal hosts ESPN's famous College GameDay show for the first time before its game against No. 8 Miami on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Utah Jazz veterans hope to lead young core
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - There are no less than ten players 23 years of age or younger currently on the Utah Jazz roster. So for veterans like Jordan Clarkson, they know their role as leaders is invaluable.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sitake wants to keep BYU hungry during bye week
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off a 34-28 win at Baylor, #17 BYU is 5-0 for the first time in three years. But head coach Kalani Sitake is going to make sure his team keeps its underdog mentality during the bye week. "That's our job," Sitake said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fred Warner's pick-6 helps the 49ers snap a 2-game skid with a 30-13 win over the Patriots
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Even after all the success the San Francisco 49ers had the past few seasons, a two-game skid and a string of injuries early in the season can raise some doubts for any team. Considered those answered for one day at least.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: More brain injuries will occur from contact sports: Doctor
item.description: Brett Favre's diagnosis with Parkinson's disease has brought discussions of the long-term effects of contact sports on brain function to the fore.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation
